title: gcc compilation warnings
body:
Don't know if these are false-positives or not, but either way it would be nice to have warning-free compilation.

- [ ] This:
```
[  2%] Building kernel/log.o
kernel/log.cc: In function ‘void Yosys::log_backtrace(const char*, int)’:
kernel/log.cc:378:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(1))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:387:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(2))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:396:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(3))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:405:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(4))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:414:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(5))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:423:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(6))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:432:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(7))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
kernel/log.cc:441:40: warning: calling ‘void* __builtin_return_address(unsigned int)’ with a nonzero argument is unsafe [-Wframe-address]
  if ((p = __builtin_extract_return_addr(__builtin_return_address(8))) && dladdr(p, &dli)) {
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

- [ ] And this:
```
[ 79%] Building backends/ilang/ilang_backend.o
backends/ilang/ilang_backend.cc: In function ‘void Yosys::ILANG_BACKEND::dump_proc_sync(std::ostream&, std::__cxx11::string, const Yosys::RTLIL::SyncRule*)’:
backends/ilang/ilang_backend.cc:222:2: warning: statement will never be executed [-Wswitch-unreachable]
  if (0) case RTLIL::ST0: f << stringf("low ");
  ^~
```

(gcc 7.2.0)
code_blocks:
[ 79%] Building backends/ilang/ilang_backend.o
backends/ilang/ilang_backend.cc: In function ‘void Yosys::ILANG_BACKEND::dump_proc_sync(std::ostream&, std::__cxx11::string, const Yosys::RTLIL::SyncRule*)’:
backends/ilang/ilang_backend.cc:222:2: warning: statement will never be executed [-Wswitch-unreachable]
  if (0) case RTLIL::ST0: f << stringf("low ");
  ^~
